notices.author: PaperStream Admin
notices.message:
Complete Year ki Fee ₹ 10330/- ki receipt lagana jaruri hai, Without complete fees ke Exam Form nahi jama kiye jayenge.
Jin bhi students ke  subject Back hai wah carried over Subject m likhe .
Form ke sath 1 semester ki mark sheet ki photo copy & fees receipt ki photo copy lagana hai
notices.title: Documents Require for Botx exam form. as Back

notices.author: PaperStream Admin
notices.message:
All students are informed that the examination forms for the May/June 2026 semester exams must be submitted before 20 May 2026.

Students who have not yet filled or submitted their exam forms are requested to complete the process as soon as possible to avoid any issues in appearing for the examination.

Last Date: 20 May 2026

— Government Polytechnic College, Jabalpur
notices.title: Exam Form

notices.author: PaperStream Admin
notices.message:
Agar koi student exam me fail/back aaya hai ya repeat karna chahta hai, aur dubara admission lena chahta hai, to usko college me ek form bhar ke jama karna hoga.

📅Last date: 20 May 2026

Agar 20 May ke baad form jama kiya, to college usko accept nahi karega.
notices.title: Fail/back
